Title: Shaolin Soccer
Writer: Stephen Chow, Kan-Cheung Tsang, Min-Hun Fung
Actors: Stephen Chow, Wei Zhao, Yat-Fei Wong
Plot: After a fateful mistake costing his career, an ex-soccer player bum meets a shaolin kung fu student trying to spread the word of kung fu. The ex-soccer player helps reconcile with his five brothers, and teaches them soccer, adding shaolin kung fu as a twist.
